jcr:content.jcr:description: See how AbbVie scientists move ideas from lab to life, transforming discovery into real-world breakthroughs that change patients’ lives.
jcr:content.jcr:title: Lab to life

block_2.analytics_id: Learn how we're using science, data and patient experiences to discover new molecules – working to bring them from the lab to life.
block_2.name: Text Container

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Learn how we're using science, data and patient experiences to discover new molecules – working to bring them from the lab to life.

custom_title.name: Custom Title
custom_title.title: Bringing discoveries from the Lab to Life

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Learn more about the experience of living with hidradenitis suppurativa and hear from AbbVie scientists about our efforts to address patients’ needs.

brightcove_video.captionDescription: Hear about the experience of living with colorectal cancer and how AbbVie scientists are exploring precision medicine approaches to cancer care.
brightcove_video.name: Brightcove Video

brightcove_video.captionDescription: Hear from a person living with multiple myeloma and how scientists are using data and new technologies to help advance blood cancer research.
brightcove_video.name: Brightcove Video

brightcove_video.captionDescription: Listen to a person living with Parkinson’s Disease and AbbVie scientists share an overview of the disease and how we’re working to address patients’ needs.
brightcove_video.name: Brightcove Video

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: From quick insights to in-depth stories, explore how our scientists and the use of new modalities and technologies are helping shape the future of medicine.

custom_title.name: Custom Title
custom_title.title: Join the team working to transform patient care
